mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, mechanically lifting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid drop in the unemployment rate below 9.0 percent signals a labor market inflection that reduces recession risk premiums, causing immediate equity repricing and positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal generates negative or flat forward returns in more than 60% of triggered instances over a 5-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous acceleration in industrial production and housing starts indicates broad-based demand recovery that expands corporate profit margins, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces a negative or zero directional accuracy over any 3-year rolling window, or the combined proxy correlation with forward returns drops below 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses above 0.25 percent alongside elevated inflation, the market prices in tighter financial conditions that compress equity multiples, yielding negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises above 0.25% while CPIAUCSL exceeds 215.0
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in more than 55% of triggered instances, or the cross-sectional predictive power vanishes after controlling for VIX levels.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects underlying economic momentum that supports corporate revenue forecasts, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
failure_condition: The rolling 12-month directional accuracy falls below 52%, or the signal's Rank IC drops below 0.02 across all market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly contraction in retail and food services sales indicates an immediate demand shock that forces downward earnings revisions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS declines by more than 5% in a single month
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict negative returns in more than 65% of observed instances, or forward returns show no statistically significant difference from the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial output combined with stable or falling short-term rates indicates supply-side efficiency gains that are not yet priced into valuations, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day window.
failure_condition: The interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in a multivariate regression over a 3-year walk-forward test, or forward returns are indistinguishable from a random walk.

mechanism_narrative: Prolonged high unemployment coupled with collapsing housing permits signals a deep structural downturn that suppresses consumer spending and corporate cash flows, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE remains above 9.5% for 6 consecutive months while HOUST falls below 500
failure_condition: The joint signal produces positive forward returns in more than 50% of triggered periods, or the predictive power disappears when controlling for credit spread widening.
